title: Medieval Entity
description: Bring the charm and mystique of the medieval era into your Minecraft world with this unique Medieval Entity pack. Add various medieval-themed entities that enrich your gameplay and make your world feel alive with history and adventure!
body:
## Intro : Introduce **hostile medieval knights** to your Minecraft world with the *Medieval Entity* mod! This mod adds a unique twist to your game by introducing **different types of knights** that spawn in various biomes. These knights will provide an exciting challenge for any adventurer brave enough to face them! ## Features: - Adds **hostile knights** in four different biomes: - **Knight Swamp** – Mysterious and dangerous knights lurking in the swamps. - **Knight Desert** – Fierce knights that dwell in the harsh desert environment. - **Knight Hills** – Towering knights found in the rocky hills, ready for battle. - **Knight Forest** – Stealthy knights that emerge from the forest to challenge you. - A **new challenge** for players seeking to battle strong, medieval-inspired enemies. **Perfect for**: Players looking to add a new level of difficulty and adventure to their Minecraft world, ideal for **PvE gameplay**, **map creators**, and fans of **medieval themes**. ## Discover More Amazing Mods! Enjoy this mod? Don’t miss future updates! Click the Follow button on the project page to get notified when new content is released. 💚🚀 ## Partners : This project is proudly supported by BisectHosting. Check out their services to easily host your projects with quality and reliability.

## Call to Action : Have questions? Need help? Join us on Discord or visit our GitHub to get involved with the community and contribute!
